assertions.text: identifies better-sqlite3 as synchronous (no await needed)
assertions.check: response explains that better-sqlite3 driver makes Drizzle queries synchronous — they return values directly, not Promises

assertions.text: explains that await on non-Promise is harmless but misleading
assertions.check: response notes that awaiting a non-Promise value resolves immediately (is not an error), but creates incorrect mental model about error handling

assertions.text: explains correct error handling with sync queries in Express 5
assertions.check: response explains that synchronous Drizzle throws are caught by Express 5 async handlers automatically — no try/catch needed IF using async handler
response notes that pg/mysql2 drivers ARE async and do need await, making this a driver-specific distinction
